sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17914" key="au)to/sitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτό-σῑτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17914.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing one's own provisions,</tr_> Com. of a <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παράσιτος,</foreign> Crobyl.I.</sense> </entryFree>
